tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent confirmed $108.11 Apr 27 (+2.64%, TradingEconomics); est. ~$102 Apr 28 (-3.8%; Rubio rejects Iran Hormuz deal - nuclear must be in deal). Iran's Hormuz proposal (Apr 27) is most concrete offer yet; Araghchi-Putin meeting Apr 27 - Russia pledges support. Nuclear stalemate persists; Rubio firm. Mine-clearing ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Tail (45%) + Stress (45%) = 90% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent est. ~$102 Apr 28 (-3.8%; Rubio rejects Iran Hormuz deal); ASEAN Energy Equities ~148.8 est. (-4.0%); ASEAN Banks ~173.0 est. (+1.3%). iTraxx Asia IG ~202bp (-6bp); ASEAN HY ~590bp (-8bp). Iran's concrete Hormuz offer (Apr 27) gives spread relief; nuclear stalemate limits full rally. ASEAN Energy long reduced on Brent sell-off; ASEAN Banks underweight narrowing as lower oil aids importers. Tail (45%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.72 est. (-0.2% Apr 28; USD softening on Iran's Hormuz offer). Iran proposal (Apr 27) positive for EM FX; Rubio rejection limits rally - tail risk 45% (down from 47%). Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; full PHP recovery still capped - nuclear stalemate unresolved. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,150 est. (-0.2% Apr 28); Indonesia 10Y ~7.32% est. (-4bp). ICP overshoot ~$32/bbl at Brent ~$102 est. - fiscal pressure eases marginally. Iran Hormuz proposal (Apr 27) mildly positive for IDR; Rubio rejection caps recovery - tail risk 45%. Hold IDR short at half-size; nuclear stalemate keeps risk elevated. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~202bp (-6bp Apr 28 est.); ASEAN HY ~590bp (-8bp). Iran Hormuz proposal (Apr 27) gives spread relief; Rubio rejection limits tightening - nuclear stalemate persists. Tail risk 45% (down from 47%). Mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal (PBS); full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection at trimmed size; tail (45%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (45%) stabilises 195-215bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$17.40 est. (-1.1% Apr 28); TTF ~€44.50 est. (-0.8%). Iran Hormuz proposal (Apr 27) mildly positive for LNG; Rubio rejection limits upside - physical situation unchanged. Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of deal (PBS). Hold JKM long; nuclear stalemate maintains structural premium. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

Execute any residual private placements. Tail (45%) still targets 230-260bp. Window remains narrow - Hormuz reopening delayed 6 months regardless of deal.
